evidence_hint: src/reconcile_fields.ts:36 LLM_MATERIALITY_FIELDS=Set(['description','intent']) and assist.ts:32 PROSE_ORIGIN_FIELDS includes 'intent'. But no meta type in schema.ts declares an intent field and buildMeta (37-69) never emits one; grep 'intent' in src shows only set-membership refs.
residual_if_not_resolved: Add intent to the metadata schema and have buildMeta populate it, or drop 'intent' from LLM_MATERIALITY_FIELDS and PROSE_ORIGIN_FIELDS.
